name: humbl-advert
description: Ask your AI assistant about PPC competitors, market share, brand appearances, and live ad searches — powered by Humbl.ai data.
long_description:
Connect your AI assistant to Humbl.ai's advert intelligence platform. Query ad exposure, find PPC competitors, track brand appearances, search the ad database, and run live ad searches — all in plain English.

**Available tools:**
- Market Share — top domains by ad exposure for a location
- Competitors — who's advertising for a keyword and where
- Domain Data — full ad exposure history for a domain
- PPC Overview — recently detected PPC sites for a location
- Brand Lookup — recent brand appearances in ad listings
- General Search — search the ad database by domain or keyword
- Live Search — real-time ad results via HumblSERP

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Humbl.ai API key. Ask your administrator to generate one at https://humbl.ai/admin/mcp/mcpapikey/

market_share.description: Top domains by ad exposure for a location

competitors.description: Top advertisers for a keyword, location, and device

domain_data.description: Ad exposure history for a specific domain

ppc_overview.description: Recently detected PPC sites for a location

brand_lookup.description: Recent brand appearances in ad listings

general_search.description: Search the ad database by domain or keyword
